continuityWarnings.evidence: Diff is a local outlier, but center movement is 1.8px, area ratio is 1.02, and normal-size review shows coherent completion of the right cardinal without a snap.
BBox-center movement is 8.6px, but the planted baseline remains fixed, area ratio is 1.06, and the visible change is continued head lowering rather than whole-body translation.
